creator: sascha@root-login.org
text:
Created attachment 167606
20160229 update

This patch updates the port to the latest version.

Fixes:
       * Handle case where no files to cleanup exists
       * no longer use stdin for domain-list

Full list: https://github.com/lukas2511/letsencrypt.sh/commits/master

Beautify the output of our periodic script so we have a descriptive header line for each script call. (spotted by Bastian Beuttel)

Successful poudriere run: https://pkgs.blumenschaender.de/data/102amd64-default/2016-03-01_12h29m31s/logs/letsencrypt.sh-0.0.0.20160229.log
